title: $value$plusargs compile error for real types (%e / %f / %g unsupported)

features.name: value$plusargs with real format specifier
features.description: Code should include a $value$plusargs call with a real format specifier (%e, %f, or %g) used to set a real variable

features.name: shortreal type with value$plusargs
features.description: Code should include a $value$plusargs call with %g format specifier used to set a shortreal variable

features.name: VL_VALUEPLUSARGS_INQ with double argument
features.description: Code should include a call to VL_VALUEPLUSARGS_INQ with a double reference argument for real type handling
